title: Tender Thai Beef Curry
description: A briny and crowd-pleasing Southern Thai dish featuring lean minced beef in a rich and creamy curry sauce, cooked to perfection in a kazan cauldron.
instructions: Heat the oil in the kazan cauldron over medium heat.
Add the curry paste and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the minced beef and cook until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the fish sauce, lime juice, brown sugar, salt, and pepper, and stir to combine.
Pour in the coconut milk and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, for 20 minutes, or until the beef is tender.
Stir in the chopped basil leaves and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Serve the curry hot, garnished with additional basil leaves if desired.
Cook ground beef to an internal temperature of 71°C / 160°F (no longer pink in the middle) before serving.
